mission: Where Songwriters Are Heard — connecting the world's greatest songwriters with opportunities that maximize the reach and value of their creative work
vision: Be the world's leading music publisher by empowering songwriters and driving catalog value across every revenue stream globally

values.name: Creator First
values.behavioral_definition: Every decision starts with what's best for our songwriters — their creative growth, their earnings, their careers

values.name: Relentless Advocacy
values.behavioral_definition: We fight for every dollar, every placement, every opportunity on behalf of our writers

values.name: Collaborative Creativity
values.behavioral_definition: We connect people — writers with writers, songs with screens, talent with opportunity

values.name: Global Reach, Local Expertise
values.behavioral_definition: We operate in 70+ countries but show up with deep local market knowledge

values.name: Catalog Stewardship
values.behavioral_definition: We treat every copyright as a long-term asset — protecting, growing, and maximizing its value over decades

annual_priorities.goal: Achieve 95% writer retention for Gold+ tier

strategic_bets: AI-powered catalog discovery and sync matching
Expansion into emerging markets (Latin America, Africa, Southeast Asia)
Production music growth for streaming platforms and gaming
Direct-to-brand sync partnerships bypassing traditional agencies

departments.name: A&R
departments.head: Guy Moot
departments.strategic_focus: Sign and develop songwriters whose catalogs generate sustained, growing revenue across all streams
departments.goal_contribution: A&R builds the catalog — every future dollar starts with a signing decision. Directly drives all revenue growth.

departments.name: Sync
departments.head: Jason Linn
departments.strategic_focus: Maximize synchronization licensing revenue through proactive pitching, deep industry relationships, and creative catalog matching
departments.goal_contribution: Sync is the highest-margin revenue stream — grew 29% last quarter. Direct driver of the $250M sync target.

departments.name: Creative Services
departments.head: Carianne Marshall
departments.strategic_focus: Facilitate co-writing sessions, connect writers across the roster, and create opportunities that compound catalog value
departments.goal_contribution: Creative Services multiplies A&R's signings by connecting writers to each other and to opportunities — catalyst for catalog growth.

departments.name: Copyright & Royalties
departments.head: Karen Steffens
departments.strategic_focus: Ensure every copyright is registered globally, every royalty is collected, and metadata accuracy is maintained across all territories
departments.goal_contribution: Directly drives the <3% leakage target. Every point of collection efficiency = millions in recovered revenue.

departments.name: Legal & Business Affairs
departments.head: David Atlas
departments.strategic_focus: Structure deals that protect WCM's interests while remaining competitive for top-tier writer signings
leading_indicators: Revenue at risk from expiring deals
departments.goal_contribution: Controls deal structure that determines advance ROI and writer retention — core to 95% retention goal.

departments.name: Digital & Strategy
departments.head: Kevin Gore
departments.strategic_focus: Optimize digital revenue through platform relationships, data analytics, and emerging technology adoption
departments.goal_contribution: Digital streaming is 50%+ of revenue — this team optimizes the largest and fastest-growing stream.

departments.name: Finance
departments.head: Elena Torres
departments.strategic_focus: Provide financial visibility into advance ROI, catalog valuation, and revenue forecasting across all streams
departments.goal_contribution: Financial discipline ensures growth is profitable — directly supports margin targets and investment decisions.

employees.name: Guy Moot
employees.role_purpose: Set creative vision and signing strategy for the global WCM catalog
key_responsibilities: Set creative direction across all territories

recent_activities.action: Signed rising songwriter Mila Torres to exclusive deal
recent_activities.detail: Torres had 3 viral tracks on TikTok in Q4 — publishing deal includes co-write commitments with existing catalog writers
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Adds fresh commercial songwriter to roster, directly feeding the sync pipeline and contributing to the $1.35B revenue target through new catalog creation

recent_activities.action: Reviewed Q1 signing pipeline with A&R leads
recent_activities.detail: 12 writers in active negotiation — 8 with streaming growth >200% YoY, 4 with sync placement history
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Pipeline coverage is strong — if 8 of 12 close, we add ~$4M in projected annual catalog value toward the revenue target

recent_activities.action: Approved co-write session budget for Nashville team
recent_activities.detail: 20 co-write sessions scheduled in March — pairing new signings with established hitmakers
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Co-writes produce 3x more commercially viable tracks than solo sessions. This directly accelerates catalog creation for both sync and streaming revenue

momentum.direction: Momentum is building — recent contributions creating ripple effects
momentum.pattern: Steady delivery cadence with growing network connections

values_aligned: Models Catalog Stewardship for the team and reinforces it in 1:1s and retros
Creates team norms that reflect Global Reach, Local Expertise in practice
areas_to_watch: Tendency to take on too much — could delegate more to grow team capacity
Could expand cross-team visibility — impact stays local

recent_activities.detail: 8 emerging writers selected — 6-month program with mentorship, co-writes, and studio access
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Cohort 1 produced 12 commercially released tracks and 2 sync placements in first year. This program is the pipeline for writer retention and catalog growth

recent_activities.detail: 14 WCM writers performing for 6 music supervisors and 3 label A&Rs
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Last showcase generated 4 sync pitches and 2 label collaborations. Direct bridge between Creative Services and Sync revenue goals

recent_activities.detail: Gold+ tier writer engagement at 93% — up from 88% last quarter after implementing monthly check-ins
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Writer engagement directly predicts retention — every Gold+ writer retained saves $200-500K in catalog replacement costs. On track for 95% retention target

employees.name: Jason Linn
employees.role_purpose: Maximize sync licensing revenue through team leadership and key relationship management
key_responsibilities: Manage sync team across LA, NYC, Miami

recent_activities.action: Secured 'Golden Hour' placement in Nike Spring campaign
recent_activities.detail: 6-month global usage across TV, digital, and retail — $180K sync fee negotiated
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Single placement moves sync pipeline from $186M to $186.18M — more importantly, Nike relationship opens doors for 2-3 more placements this year toward the $250M sync target

recent_activities.action: Pitched 15 tracks to HBO for upcoming limited series
recent_activities.detail: Curated from catalog focusing on atmospheric/ambient — showrunner requested exclusive first listen
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: HBO series placements average $50-75K per track. If 3-5 land, that's $150-375K in sync revenue plus massive streaming lift from the show's audience

recent_activities.action: Updated sync catalog metadata for AI search
recent_activities.detail: Tagged 2,400 tracks with mood, tempo, instrumentation, and scene-type metadata
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Music supervisors can now find our tracks 4x faster. Speed of response is the #1 factor in winning sync deals — this protects and grows our $250M target

employees.name: Karen Steffens
employees.role_purpose: Ensure WCM captures every dollar owed through rigorous copyright administration and royalty collection
key_responsibilities: Recover unclaimed royalties across all territories

recent_activities.action: Recovered $340K in unpaid mechanical royalties from DSP audit
recent_activities.detail: Identified systematic under-reporting from mid-tier streaming platform — 18-month backlog resolved
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Recovery goes straight to bottom line and writer trust. This kind of precision is why our royalty leakage target of <3% is achievable — currently at 2.8%

recent_activities.action: Deployed automated royalty matching for 12,000 unmatched works
recent_activities.detail: ML model matched 89% of previously unmatched streams to correct copyright holders
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: 12,000 works now collecting royalties they weren't before — estimated $1.2M annually in previously uncollected revenue, directly feeding the $1.35B target

recent_activities.action: Submitted quarterly royalty statements to all Gold+ writers
recent_activities.detail: 284 writers received statements — 3 days ahead of contractual deadline
recent_activities.what_it_enabled: On-time, accurate royalty payments are the #1 factor in writer retention. Ahead-of-schedule delivery reinforces trust and supports the 95% retention target

recent_activities.what_it_enabled: Early close gives leadership an extra 2 days to react to trends. Sync over-performance means we may beat the $250M annual target — important signal for Q2 planning
